meta_title: For Founders: user onboarding to Solve no project ideas (Advanced Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome no project ideas. A Advanced-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: User Onboarding to Solve No Project Ideas
content.seo_description: Stop stalling. Overcome 'no project ideas' by building high-retention user onboarding. An advanced guide for AI founders using Antigravity and Claude Code.
content.answer_block: You are stuck because you lack a feedback loop, not an idea. By building a high-friction, high-value onboarding flow, you force users to reveal their pain points immediately. This transforms your lack of direction into a data-driven roadmap, allowing you to monetize faster by solving actual problems.
content.intro:
The blank screen is the graveyard of ambition. You feel paralyzed, staring at a cursor, waiting for a 'perfect' SaaS idea to strike while your burn rate ticks upward. The truth is, perfection is a hallucination; the market doesn't care about your idea, it cares about its own problems. 

Stop hunting for the 'next big thing' and start building the 'next best onboarding.' By focusing on the first 60 seconds of a user's journey, you shift from guessing to observing. This is how you pivot from a stagnant founder to a data-backed architect, turning every sign-up into a diagnostic tool that tells you exactly what to build next.

steps.title: Architect the Value-First Hook
steps.description: Identify the 'Aha!' moment and strip away everything that delays it. Your goal is to deliver immediate utility before asking for a single credit card detail.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a schema for a 3-step onboarding flow that captures user intent and maps it to a specific SaaS micro-service feature.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'generate onboarding flow schema and mock initial state'

steps.title: Implement Intelligent User Profiling
steps.description: Use an AI-driven questionnaire during onboarding to categorize users by their specific business pain points.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Design an adaptive questionnaire component that updates the user's dashboard persona based on their input, using React and Tailwind.

steps.title: Automate Personalized Product Tours
steps.description: Don't show a generic tour. Use the data from Step 2 to highlight only the features relevant to that specific user's persona.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a conditional rendering logic that triggers custom tooltips based on the user_persona object.

steps.title: Integrate 'Kill-Switch' Analytics
steps.description: Track exactly where users drop off during onboarding. If they quit at step 2, that step is your primary friction point.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Set up PostHog event tracking for each onboarding step completion to identify conversion bottlenecks.

steps.title: Iterative Deployment Loop
steps.description: Launch the onboarding flow as a standalone experiment. If no one engages, the idea is dead; if they do, you have your roadmap.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a CI/CD script to deploy this onboarding flow to a staging environment for rapid A/B testing.

pro_tips: Never ask for an email until the user has successfully completed at least one core task.
Use 'ghost content'—show the dashboard filled with fake data based on their onboarding choices to prove value instantly.
Monitor 'time-to-first-value' (TTFV) as your primary metric; if it's over 90 seconds, you are losing 50% of your leads.
Implement a 'Concierge Onboarding' button that connects them to a human (or an AI agent) for high-ticket setups.
If your onboarding completion rate is below 30%, your value proposition is misaligned with the landing page copy.
content.next_steps: Analyze your drop-off rates for 48 hours, optimize the friction points, and begin building the specific features your users requested during the onboarding flow.
content.conversion_block: You now have the technical blueprint to validate your market through high-intent user data. Stop guessing and start building products that users actually demand. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
